feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about engineering communication, and I'm joined by Jonas, staff engineer focused on platform teams. Jonas, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Priya was on episode 1 making the case that good on-call rotations are designed so waking up is rare. I want to push that further into how we communicate the design itself.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Practical Systems. Today we're talking about engineering communication, and I'm joined by Jonas, staff engineer focused on platform teams. Jonas, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Staff-Engineer Communication Patterns
